title: Tensura: Starlight
description: Addon for the Tensura: Reincarnated Mod for Neoforge 1.21.1
body:
Tensura: Starlight is an addon for 1.21.1 Neoforge Tensura: Reincarnated

This mod also additionally requires "**Apothic Attributes**" , "**Sauce Lib**".

THIS MOD WILL NEVER SUPPORT FABRIC, IF YOU WISH TO PORT IT TO FABRIC, YOU MAY DO SO.

# Features
## Supported Languages
- English

## Playable Races
- Aspectborn

## Ultimate Skills

## Evolved-Unique Skills

Aspect-Series Skills:

- Vestiges of Eidolons
- Remnants of Ascension

## Unique Skills

Aspect-Series Skills:

- Light Remains
- Echo Endures
- Life Returns
- Ember Remains
- Current Unbroken
- Shape Forgotten

Other Skills:

- Memory Recreation
- Magicule Engravement
- Phantasmal Creation

## Extra Skills

Item-Related Skills:

- Unleashed Dead End

## Additional Notes

Some parts of the code is written by AI due to my lacking experience with Java, and modding minecraft as a whole.

## Acknowledgements & Credits
- Elden Ringer (Discord): Provided Icon art for Tensura: Starlight.
- Bael (TR: Nightmares Dev): General code help.
- Dranyas: (TR: Mysticism Dev): General code help.
- Radient Fox & Terracharm (TR: Stellar Prism Dev): General code help.
- Does a 50 hit? (TR: Eldritch Dev): General code help.

If I have missed anyone, or you would like to be added please contact me on discord <3
